name: lesson-total-package
description: Selectable teaching package plugin that bundles lesson planning modules for board-writing, mind maps, PBL, and inquiry-report assessment.

interface.shortDescription: Selectable package for board-writing, mind map, PBL, and assessment
interface.longDescription: Build Korean lesson packages by selectively combining board-writing, mind map, PBL, and inquiry-report assessment modules instead of forcing a fixed bundle.
defaultPrompt: Bundle only board-writing and mind map for this lesson.
Design PBL and inquiry-report assessment together.
Connect board-writing, mind map, PBL, and assessment.
